sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: More people are buying Starbucks as transactions rise 3.8%
feed.summary: Starbucks reported strong financial results for its Q2 fiscal year 2026, with consolidated net revenues increasing 9% to $9.5 billion. Global comparable store sales rose by 6.2%, driven by a 3.8% increase in comparable transactions and a 2.3% increase in average ticket. The company also raised its fiscal year 2026 guidance for comparable store sales growth and non-GAAP EPS, attributing the positive performance to its "Back to Starbucks" plan.

feed.title: Product sales jump 22% as F5 lifts full-year revenue forecast
feed.summary: F5, Inc. reported strong financial results for its second quarter fiscal year 2026, with total revenue increasing 11% year-over-year to $812 million, driven by a 22% jump in product revenue. Following this performance, the company raised its full-year revenue forecast to a growth range of 7% to 8% and increased its non-GAAP earnings per share guidance. F5 attributes its continued growth to demand for its solutions in hybrid multicloud adoption, an expanding cybersecurity threat landscape, and an inflection in AI inference.

feed.title: Welltower Q1 Normalized FFO Rises 23%, Lifts 2026 View
feed.summary: Welltower (NYSE: WELL) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with normalized FFO per diluted share increasing by 23% year-over-year to $1.47 and net income attributable to common stockholders at $1.02 per diluted share. The company announced $10.5 billion in year-to-date investment activity and raised its full-year 2026 guidance for both net income and normalized FFO, citing robust same-store NOI growth, particularly in Seniors Housing Operating. Welltower also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.74 per share and highlighted its strong liquidity of approximately $11.1 billion.

feed.title: T-Mobile made $18.8B in service revenue and still raised 2026 targets
feed.summary: T-Mobile reported Q1 2026 service revenue of $18.8 billion, an 11% year-over-year increase, driven by strong postpaid account additions and ARPA growth. Despite a decrease in net income due to UScellular merger-related costs, the company raised its 2026 guidance for postpaid net account additions, Core Adjusted EBITDA, net cash provided by operating activities, and Adjusted Free Cash Flow. T-Mobile continues to expand its 5G network lead and is incorporating advanced technologies like connecting Figure AI's humanoid robots to its 5G network.

feed.title: Enphase targets AI data centers with power gear designed to free up GPU space
feed.summary: Enphase Energy announced the development of its IQ® Solid-State Transformer (IQ SST) platform, a distributed power solution for 800 VDC AI data centers. This system aims for high efficiency (98.5%) and availability (99.999%), leveraging Enphase's microinverter technology to free up floor space typically used by power infrastructure for GPUs. Demos are expected in late 2026, with pilots in 2027 and volume shipments in 2028, targeting a U.S. addressable market exceeding 11 GW by 2031.

feed.title: Caesars says digital unit hit a record Q1 as revenue reached $2.9B
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. reported GAAP net revenues of $2.9 billion for the first quarter of 2026, a slight increase from $2.8 billion in the prior-year period. The company's net loss narrowed to $98 million from $115 million year-over-year. Caesars Digital achieved record first-quarter results with revenue of $374 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $69 million.

feed.title: $222.8M gives Design Therapeutics funding into 2029 as trials advance
feed.summary: Design Therapeutics reported its Q1 2026 financial results, closing the quarter with $222.8 million in cash, which is expected to fund operations into 2029. The company highlighted ongoing clinical trials, including the RESTORE-FA multiple-ascending-dose trial for DT-216P2 and a Phase 2 DT-168 biomarker study, with key data readouts anticipated in H2 2026. Additionally, dosing for DT-818 (DM1) is expected to begin in H1 2026, and David Shapiro, M.D., was appointed to the board to enhance clinical and regulatory expertise.

feed.title: Arch Capital Group Ltd. Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with net income available to common shareholders reaching $1.0 billion, or $2.88 per share, and an annualized operating return on average common equity of 15.4%. The company saw favorable development in prior year loss reserves and a combined ratio excluding catastrophic activity and prior year development of 82.3%. These results underscore Arch's disciplined underwriting and capital allocation strategies, as noted by CEO Nicolas Papadopoulo.

feed.title: naturemary Secures National Distribution with McKesson Canada, Unlocking Access to Thousands of Pharmacies
feed.summary: naturemary, a Canadian plant-based wellness company, has secured national distribution with McKesson Canada, a major pharmaceutical and healthcare distributor. This partnership will allow naturemary's plant-derived topical pain relief products to be easily accessed by pharmacies across Canada, significantly expanding the company's national footprint. The collaboration aims to provide Canadians with more access to natural, science-inspired solutions for muscle, joint, and headache relief, catering to a growing demand for natural wellness products.

feed.title: Claude AI Can Orchestrate Creative Workflows Across Adobe Apps
feed.summary: Adobe has significantly expanded its AI-powered creative ecosystem by integrating the Adobe for creativity connector for Anthropic’s Claude, alongside launching a public beta of Firefly AI Assistant. These updates enable agentic workflows, allowing users to orchestrate creative tasks across multiple Adobe applications using natural-language prompts within Claude or Firefly. This integration aims to simplify complex creative processes, letting AI systems handle execution across interconnected tools like Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere, while users define their creative intent.

feed.title: [IRANNOTICE] Chubb Ltd SEC Filing
feed.summary: Chubb Limited has filed an IRANNOTICE with the SEC, informing about disclosures made in its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ended March 31, 2026. This filing is mandated under Section 219 of the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act of 2012 and Section 13(r) of the Exchange Act. The notice was signed by George F. Ohsiek, Chief Accounting Officer.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management holds 8% of Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 13,870,311 shares, equivalent to an 8% stake, in Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicating a passive investment rather than an intent to control the company. Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over these shares, with limited voting power, consistent with its role as a portfolio manager.

feed.title: Visa, Mastercard, American Express Are Down by Double Digits in 2026: Buying Opportunity or Trap?
feed.summary: Visa, Mastercard, and American Express are all down by double digits year-to-date in 2026 despite reporting strong Q1 earnings that beat Wall Street estimates. Investors are concerned about threats from stablecoins, alternative payment rails, and ongoing regulatory pressure on interchange fees. The article explores both the bull case, emphasizing the strong fundamentals and market dominance of these payment networks, and the bear case, highlighting the legitimate threats that could reprice interchange economics.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management increases passive stake in Albemarle (NYSE: ALB)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported an increased passive stake in Albemarle (NYSE: ALB), beneficially owning 6,331,772 shares, which represents 5.38% of the company's common stock. This disclosure was made in a Schedule 13G SEC filing for the period ending March 31, 2026. The filing confirms Vanguard's position as a passive institutional investor, primarily exercising sole dispositive power over its shares.

feed.title: Vanguard (ALL) reports 13.70M shares, 5.27% stake (Schedule 13G)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 13,697,365 shares in Allstate Corp/The (ALL), which represents a 5.27% stake. The filing indicates Vanguard's sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 47,654 shares. This disclosure, dated April 28, 2026, aims to provide transparency regarding significant ownership in publicly traded companies.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management reports 14.39M shares in Agilent (NYSE: A)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a 5.09% stake in Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A), owning 14,387,171 shares as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment intent with Vanguard holding sole dispositive power over all shares and limited sole voting power over 34,489 shares. The filing was signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, on April 28, 2026.

feed.title: Katy Chen of Kimberly-Clark (KMB) gains stock via RSU vesting and grants
feed.summary: Katy Chen, President of International Personal Care at Kimberly-Clark (KMB), increased her equity stake through compensation awards. On April 26, 2026, she acquired 823 common shares from vested performance-based restricted share units and received a new grant of 3,087 restricted share units, with a vesting schedule over three years. No open-market sales were reported in this transaction.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark (NYSE: KMB) CEO reports RSU grants, vesting and tax share surrenders
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark CEO Michael D. Hsu reported several equity compensation events, including the receipt of 76,208 shares as a grant and the exercise of 13,548 restricted share units. To cover tax obligations upon vesting, 35,320 shares were automatically surrendered to the issuer at $97.85 per share. Following these transactions, Hsu directly held 355,029 shares and indirectly held 21,991 shares through a trust.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) prices $5M 4.40% callable notes due 2031
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has priced $5 million of Senior Medium-Term Notes, Series EE Callable Fixed Rate Notes due April 30, 2031, with a fixed interest rate of 4.40% per annum. These notes are callable at the issuer's option semiannually from October 30, 2027, through October 30, 2030, and interest is payable semiannually starting October 30, 2026. The offering yielded U.S. Bancorp $4,961,500 before expenses and explicitly states the notes are senior, unsecured obligations and not FDIC-insured.

feed.title: AIG Ordered to Cover Most of Advertising Firm’s SEC Settlement
feed.summary: A Delaware Superior Court judge ruled that an American International Group Inc. unit must cover most of a $26 million settlement Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings Inc. paid to the SEC. The settlement resolved an enforcement action alleging foreign bribery, and the court found that the directors and officers insurance policy issued by AIG's Illinois National Insurance Co. covers disgorgement and prejudgment interest. These amounts are considered a covered loss under the policy.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams sees input costs rising after sales beat
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams reported strong sales, the highest since 2023, but anticipates a rise in input costs. The article by Ignacio Gonzalez notes this financial outlook for the company.

feed.title: Kenyatta Rocker Sells 27,387 Shares of Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) Stock
feed.summary: Kenyatta Rocker, EVP of Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP), sold 27,387 shares of the company's stock for over $7.44 million, reducing his ownership by 30.95%. This transaction comes after Union Pacific reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with EPS of $2.93 and revenue of $6.22 billion, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.38 per share. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with a price target of $279.55.

feed.title: Italy’s Eni Expands Venezuela Push With Orinoco Oil Deal
feed.summary: Italy's Eni SpA has signed an agreement with Venezuela's state-owned Petróleos de Venezuela SA to restart the Junín-5 oil project in the Orinoco Belt. This move expands Eni's presence in Venezuela as US sanctions are eased. The agreement was reached after a meeting between Eni CEO Claudio Descalzi and interim President Delcy Rodríguez.

feed.title: Constellation Energy declares qtrly dividend of $0.4265 per share
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corporation has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.4265 per share, payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. This announcement confirms the company's consistent dividend payment to its investors.

feed.title: Principal keeps A+ insurer ratings as AM Best holds outlook stable
feed.summary: AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A+ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings of "aa" (Superior) for Principal Life Insurance Company and Principal National Life Insurance Company, both components of Principal Financial Group (PFG). The ratings reflect Principal's very strong balance sheet strength, strong operating performance, favorable business profile, and very strong enterprise risk management, with a stable outlook. This comes as Principal has shifted focus towards fee-based products and strengthened its capital and risk modeling.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Named a Top Performer in Hearts & Wallets Customer Satisfaction Survey for the Eighth Time
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP) has been recognized for the eighth year as a Top Performer in the Hearts & Wallets 2026 Wants & Pricing Report for being a company that "understands me and shares my values." This distinction highlights Ameriprise's consistent commitment to personalized financial planning, based on a survey of nearly 6,000 U.S. households. The company's senior vice president of marketing, Marie O’Neill, credited their brand strength and financial advisors for the sustained recognition.

feed.title: Insider sale of 6,735 shares reported at TRV (NYSE: TRV) in Form 144
feed.summary: An insider at Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) has filed a Form 144 indicating their intent to sell 6,735 shares. This sale follows a stock option exercise scheduled for April 28, 2026, for cash. The filing also notes a previous sale of 4,756 shares by Avrohom J. Kess on February 20, 2026.

feed.title: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Principal Financial Group, Inc. and Its Subsidiaries
feed.summary: AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A+ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings of "aa" (Superior) for Principal Life Insurance Company and Principal National Life Insurance Company, operating companies of Principal Financial Group, Inc. (PFG). The ratings reflect Principal's very strong balance sheet strength, strong operating performance, favorable business profile, and very strong enterprise risk management. The outlook for these ratings is stable.

feed.title: KLA Corporation and NXP Semiconductors Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: KLA Corporation and NXP Semiconductors experienced a stock price drop due to a broad selloff in the semiconductor industry. This downturn was triggered by concerns over future AI spending after OpenAI missed internal targets and escalating U.S.-China tensions regarding AI technology and supply chains. Despite the current dip, KLA Corporation has shown significant year-to-date growth and long-term returns for investors.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE: GL) CEO sells 18,318 shares after option exercise
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc.'s Co-Chairman & CEO, James Matthew Darden, exercised 18,318 employee stock options at $100.74 per share and subsequently sold all 18,318 shares in an open-market transaction for an average price of $145.1029 per share. After these transactions, Darden directly holds 58,451.4598 shares, with additional shares in a 401(k) Plan and 26,682 outstanding employee stock options. This activity is a typical exercise-and-sell pattern.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) issues $1.5M 5.70% callable notes due 2044
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) has priced $1.5 million in Senior Medium-Term Notes, Series EE Callable Fixed Rate Notes, due April 30, 2044. These notes carry a fixed interest rate of 5.70% per annum, with interest payable annually each April 30. U.S. Bancorp has the option to redeem the notes quarterly starting April 30, 2029, and the original issue date for settlement is April 30, 2026.

feed.title: INVH Initiates Coverage On Compass Point -- Rating Set to Neutra
feed.summary: Compass Point has initiated coverage on Invitation Homes (INVH) with a Neutral rating, reflecting a cautious stance despite the stock being 24.8% undervalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value™. The company, which focuses on single-family rental homes, shows strong financial health and growth potential with a GF Score™ of 80/100, though it has a lower momentum score. Investors are advised to approach INVH with caution, considering the potential buying opportunity due to undervaluation against the analyst's neutral outlook.

feed.title: McDonald's (MCD) to Introduce New Crafted Beverages on May 6
feed.summary: McDonald's (MCD) will launch six new crafted beverages in U.S. locations starting May 6, targeting younger consumers and competing with Starbucks and Dunkin'. The company, with a strong market position and a GF Score of 86/100, aims to enhance customer engagement and sales. Despite strong profitability and growth potential, recent insider selling and a moderate financial strength rating suggest investors should proceed with caution.

feed.title: Fund Update: 1,098,108 LEONARDO DRS (DRS) shares added to Stephens Investment Management Group LLC portfolio
feed.summary: Stephens Investment Management Group LLC has added 1,098,108 shares of LEONARDO DRS (DRS) to its portfolio, as per a Q1 2026 SEC 13F filing. This move comes as other institutional investors have both increased and decreased their positions in DRS, and various insiders have sold shares while a member of Congress made a purchase. The article details recent hedge fund activity, insider trading, and congressional stock trading for DRS.

feed.title: Emerson Electric (EMR) Share Price, Sales Growth, and Revenue Forecast – 2026 Analysis - News and Statistics
feed.summary: An analysis by IndexBox indicates that Emerson Electric (EMR) has shown modest returns and sluggish growth. Over the past six months, the company delivered a 4.4% return, with its share price at $140.01. Sales growth and revenue forecasts are considered underwhelming, and a declining free cash flow margin suggests increasing investment needs.

feed.title: AES Brasil Energia S.A. stock (BRAESBACNOR1): Why does its renewable energy focus matter more now for global investors?
feed.summary: AES Brasil Energia S.A. (BRAESBACNOR1) is a key player in Brazil's accelerating energy transition, focusing heavily on wind and solar power. This strategy positions the company to benefit from the growing global demand for clean energy and offers U.S. and English-speaking investors diversified exposure to an emerging market's green energy sector without direct currency risk, thanks to its B3 listing. The firm's long-term contracts, operational efficiency, and parent company backing support predictable dividends and growth, appealing to both income-focused and ESG-mandated portfolios.

feed.title: Fed Meeting Preview: Powell's Last Hawkish Stand?
feed.summary: The Federal Reserve is heading into its April meeting under pressure, with markets now pricing in no rate cuts for all of 2026, a significant reversal from earlier expectations. Chairman Jerome Powell is expected to maintain a hawkish stance due to heating inflation, firm growth, and economic uncertainties from the Iran war. The prospect of Kevin Warsh succeeding Powell as Fed chair is also discussed, though policy changes from this transition are deemed unlikely in the short term.

feed.title: Virginia American Water Proudly Recognizes American Water Charitable Foundation 2026 Water and Environment Grantees
feed.summary: The American Water Charitable Foundation and Virginia American Water have announced the recipients of their 2026 Water and Environment grants. Four nonprofit organizations in Virginia, including Wilderness Kids, Friendship Veterans Fire Association of Alexandria Virginia, James River Association, and Jessica Ann Moore Foundation, received a combined $77,199. These grants support projects focused on clean water, conservation, environmental education, and water-based recreation, reflecting American Water's commitment to investing in communities and environmental stewardship.

feed.title: Union Pacific EVP Kenyatta Rocker sells $7.44 million in shares
feed.summary: Kenyatta G. Rocker, EVP of Marketing & Sales at Union Pacific Corp (NYSE:UNP), sold 27,387 shares of company stock for $7.44 million on April 24, 2026, while also acquiring the same number of shares through stock options for $4.81 million. Following these transactions, Mr. Rocker directly holds over 61,000 shares of Union Pacific. The company recently reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with multiple analysts raising their price targets for the stock.

feed.title: Delek Logistics Partners Q1 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article provides a Q1 2026 earnings preview for Delek Logistics Partners. It would typically discuss analyst expectations, past performance, and potential factors impacting the upcoming earnings report. However, the provided content is empty.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Urges BW Stockholders Who Lost Money Investing in Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises to Contact the Firm for Information About Leading the Class Action
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is urging stockholders of Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises (NYSE: BW) who lost money to contact the firm regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Babcock & Wilcox misled investors by failing to disclose critical information about a Power Generation Contract, including the close ties between its largest shareholder, BRC, and the counterparty, Base Electron, and whether Applied Digital actually needed the products. As a result of a Wolfpack Research report exposing these issues, the stock price fell by 11.59%.

feed.title: Intel, Qualcomm Alert: Analyst Says Some Chip Stocks Are 'Living In A Bad Neighborhood'
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon states that the semiconductor industry is experiencing unprecedented AI-driven growth. Despite this overall positive trend, Rasgon expresses skepticism regarding Intel's valuation, finding it hard to justify at current stock levels, and cautions that Qualcomm is facing macro headwinds due to weak smartphone demand. He believes these stocks are "living in a bad neighborhood" despite operational execution and improving fundamentals.

feed.title: KLA Corporation and NXP Semiconductors Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of KLA Corporation and NXP Semiconductors fell following a broad semiconductor industry selloff. This decline was triggered by concerns over future AI spending after OpenAI reportedly missed internal user and revenue targets, coupled with rising geopolitical risks and U.S.-China tensions over AI technology. The market reacted to fears of reduced demand for chips, impacting numerous semiconductor and AI-related stocks.

feed.title: According to sources familiar with the matter, industrial technology company Ametek Inc is in advanced talks to acquire the test and measurement business under Indicor.
feed.summary: Industrial technology company Ametek Inc is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire Indicor's test and measurement business for an estimated $5 billion. This acquisition would significantly enhance AMETEK's product portfolio and market position in precision testing and measurement instruments, aligning with its strategy of growth through strategic acquisitions. The deal, if negotiations proceed smoothly, is expected to be finalized within weeks, strengthening AMETEK's competitiveness in the global industrial technology market.

feed.title: NBA Expansion In Las Vegas Attracts Magic Johnson - Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO), Blackstone (NYSE
feed.summary: The NBA is looking to expand with new teams in Las Vegas and Seattle, expecting to sell franchises for at least $10 billion. High-profile investors like Magic Johnson, Bill Foley, and Marc Lasry are showing interest in the Las Vegas team, while Samantha Holloway is positioning for a bid in Seattle. The league's board of governors is expected to decide on expansion later this year, with private equity firms also actively investing in professional sports.

feed.title: Boeing and Copa Airlines Announce Order for up to 60 737 MAX Jets
feed.summary: Boeing and Copa Airlines announced an order for 40 737 MAX airplanes, with options for up to 20 more, to expand and modernize Copa's all-737 fleet. This agreement, along with existing orders, will lead to over 100 new 737 MAX aircraft for Copa, enabling further network expansion from its "Hub of the Americas." The airline emphasized the efficiency and versatility of the 737 MAX in supporting its growth and contributing to Panama's economic development.

feed.title: Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP) EVP exercises options and sells 27,387 shares
feed.summary: Kenyatta G. Rocker, EVP Marketing & Sales at Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP), exercised stock options to acquire 27,387 shares and subsequently sold the same number of shares on April 24, 2026, at $271.76 per share. Following these transactions, Rocker directly held 61,101.9337 shares of Union Pacific common stock, in addition to indirect holdings. This insider activity resulted in a net sale of 27,387 shares totaling $7.44 million.

feed.title: Box Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Document Management
feed.summary: Box, Inc. has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Document Management, validating its AI transformation and commitment to secure, AI-powered enterprise content platforms. The company emphasizes delivering governed agentic experiences for businesses, including highly regulated industries, by enabling AI agents to interact securely with enterprise content. Box's COO, Olivia Nottebohm, highlights how their platform empowers AI agents to reason, orchestrate workflows, and execute complex tasks using advanced AI models.

feed.title: Box Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Document Management
feed.summary: Box, Inc. has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Document Management, validating its complete AI transformation and commitment to secure, AI-powered enterprise content platforms. The company focuses on enabling AI agents with secure access to enterprise content, catering to highly regulated industries. This recognition highlights Box's ability to execute and completeness of vision in empowering customers to use Box AI for analyzing, managing, and processing content effectively.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management discloses 5.39% stake in Everest Group Ltd (EG)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a 5.39% stake in Everest Group Ltd (EG), holding 2,180,240 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates Vanguard possesses sole dispositive power over all these shares but only sole voting power over 12,150 shares, suggesting limited voting influence despite its significant economic ownership. This Schedule 13G filing aggregates holdings across various Vanguard affiliates and managed accounts.
